codeReview.summary: The implementation successfully adds streaming output to standard and ndjson modes while leaving json mode aggregated. It introduces an AtomicLineWriter to ensure line-buffering and creates comprehensive tests for TTFB streaming speed, lack of line interleaving, and JSON aggregation. The code cleanly wraps native search paths with these streaming sinks and satisfies all requirements specified in the feature description.

summary: Review passed: Streaming functionality was properly added to standard and NDJSON modes with appropriate line-buffering and excellent test coverage.
